title: sanguisorba minor var. stenolopha
intro: Sanguisorba minor var. stenolopha, also known as salad burnet, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive, frilly leaves and delicate white flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of sanguisorba minor var. stenolopha include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salads for its mild, sweet flavor.
